caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political news program titled "Plus Politics," broadcasted by PlusTV. The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. He is engaged in a discussion or interview, as indicated by his hand gestures and attentive posture. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. The topic of discussion seems to revolve around a statement made by Bola Tinubu, suggesting that Nigeria needs him. The lower third of the screen displays the show's title, the topic being discussed, and social media prompts for viewers to follow and subscribe to the channel. The overall setting suggests a professional and informative tone, typical of news and political analysis programs.
